parameters.jsCode:
const accounts = [
  { handle: 'byjoeym', platform: 'instagram' },
  { handle: 'pedrovaleriolopez', platform: 'instagram' },
  { handle: 'dougdemarco_', platform: 'instagram' },
  { handle: 'franklim.gui', platform: 'instagram' },
  { handle: 'thegrowthceo', platform: 'instagram' },
  { handle: 'chase.h.ai', platform: 'instagram' },
  { handle: 'thevibefounder', platform: 'instagram' },
  { handle: 'godofprompt', platform: 'instagram' },
  { handle: 'philipisberg', platform: 'instagram' },
  { handle: 'daniel.avell', platform: 'instagram' },
  { handle: 'stevearnesonofficial', platform: 'instagram' },
  { handle: 'noevarner.ai', platform: 'instagram' },
  { handle: 'nateherkai', platform: 'instagram' }
];
return accounts.map(a => ({ json: a }));

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "account_id": {{ $json.id ? '"' + $json.id + '"' : 'null' }},
  "post_id": "{{ $('Parse Claude Response').item.json.post_id }}",
  "post_url": "{{ $('Parse Claude Response').item.json.post_url }}",
  "format": "{{ $('Parse Claude Response').item.json.format }}",
  "caption_as_script": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Claude Response').item.json.caption_as_script || '') }},
  "hook_text": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Claude Response').item.json.hook_text || '') }},
  "hook_type": "{{ $('Parse Claude Response').item.json.hook_type || 'curiosity_gap' }}",
  "hook_text_refined": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Claude Response').item.json.hook_text_refined || '') }},
  "content_topic": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Claude Response').item.json.content_topic || '') }},
  "narrative_structure": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Claude Response').item.json.narrative_structure || {}) }},
  "why_it_worked": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Claude Response').item.json.why_it_worked || '') }},
  "buy_trigger": "{{ $('Parse Claude Response').item.json.buy_trigger || 'curiosity' }}",
  "applicable_formats": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Claude Response').item.json.applicable_formats || []) }},
  "relevance_score": {{ $('Parse Claude Response').item.json.relevance_score || 0 }},
  "likes": {{ $('Parse Claude Response').item.json.likes || 0 }},
  "comments": {{ $('Parse Claude Response').item.json.comments || 0 }},
  "views": {{ $('Parse Claude Response').item.json.views !== null && $('Parse Claude Response').item.json.views !== undefined ? $('Parse Claude Response').item.json.views : 'null' }},
  "engagement_score": {{ $('Parse Claude Response').item.json.engagement_score || 0 }},
  "posted_at": {{ $('Parse Claude Response').item.json.posted_at ? '"' + $('Parse Claude Response').item.json.posted_at + '"' : 'null' }},
  "analyzed_at": "{{ new Date().toISOString() }}"
}
